property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.10 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.10 in;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.11-bin\apache-maven-3.9.11 in;;C:\minikube;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.10 in;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2025.2.1 in;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users\USER\Downloads\stripe_1.34.0_windows_x86_64;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE in;c:\Users\USER\.antigravity-ide\extensions\ms-python.debugpy-2026.6.0-win32-x64 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;c:\Users\USER\.antigravity-ide\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0-universal undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: testFailedLoginWithInvalidCredentials

Running negative test case: Login with invalid credentials... 2026-07-03 13:09:51 [main] INFO com.automation.utils.ReportUtils - Attempting login with invalid email: invalid_user_5933@gmail.com and invalid password. 2026-07-03 13:09:51 [main] INFO com.automation.utils.ElementUtils - Checking visibility of element By.xpath: //div[contains(@class, 'error') or contains(@class, 'alert')] | //*[contains(text(), 'Invalid') or contains(text(), 'invalid') or contains(text(), 'failed') or contains(text(), 'incorrect') or contains(text(), 'user id')] 2026-07-03 13:09:53 [main] INFO com.automation.utils.ElementUtils - Waiting for element By.xpath: //div[contains(@class, 'error') or contains(@class, 'alert')] | //*[contains(text(), 'Invalid') or contains(text(), 'invalid') or contains(text(), 'failed') or contains(text(), 'incorrect') or contains(text(), 'user id')] to be visible (Timeout: 15s) 2026-07-03 13:09:54 [main] INFO com.automation.utils.ElementUtils - Retrieved text 'Invalid user id.' from element By.xpath: //div[contains(@class, 'error') or contains(@class, 'alert')] | //*[contains(text(), 'Invalid') or contains(text(), 'invalid') or contains(text(), 'failed') or contains(text(), 'incorrect') or contains(text(), 'user id')] 2026-07-03 13:09:54 [main] INFO com.automation.utils.ReportUtils - Actual error message displayed: 'Invalid user id.' 2026-07-03 13:09:54 [main] INFO com.automation.utils.ReportUtils - [PASS] Negative login test passed. Login failed as expected, and error message was correctly displayed: 'Invalid user id.'
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. Jul 03, 2026 1:09:43 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 Jul 03, 2026 1:09:43 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.201. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: testSuccessfulOnboarding

failure.message: Failed to submit onboarding request or open a new tab with NPI: 1780658039 expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Failed to submit onboarding request or open a new tab with NPI: 1780658039 expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
